top_signals.title: PRA consults on updated guidance for friendly society amalgamations and transfers
top_signals.summary: The proposals would provide more detail on the PRA’s approach to Part VIII transactions, helping firms plan amalgamations and transfers more efficiently.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Polymarket ‘surprised’ France blocked site as information source, plans legal challenge
top_signals.summary: Last week, the ANJ ordered French internet service providers to block access to Polymarket ahead of the World Cup final.
